holdings.infoBox: INEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are UniCredit stock at 4.94%, BHP Group at 4.76%, DBS Group Holdings at 4.52%, Deutsche Telekom AG at 4.31%, and Shell at 4.23%.

overview.description: The Columbia International Equity Income ETF (INEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of dividend-paying companies in developed markets outside the US. The fund uses a proprietary, fundamental selection process with an exclusionary screen for ESG risk INEQ was launched on Jun 13, 2016 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
